itinerary.title: Swiss Highlights Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: Zurich • Lucerne • Mt. Titlis • Interlaken • Swiss Alps • Scenic Rail Journeys
itinerary.overview:
Zurich • Lucerne • Mt. Titlis • Interlaken • Swiss Alps • Scenic Rail Journeys 06 Nights / 07 Days Comprehensive Swiss Highlights Family Expedition SERIAL CODE: CH-001 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-SWI-HIG-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Switzerland CATEGORY: Best Swiss Highlights Family Tour Package DURATION: 06 Nights / 07 Days Zurich (1N) + Lucerne (2N) + Interlaken (3N)

TOUR OVERVIEW
Discover the breathtaking beauty of the Swiss Alps with our TRAGUIN curated family expedition. This comprehensive journey takes your family through pristine lakes, majestic peaks, and scenic rail journeys, ensuring unforgettable memories in the most stunning landscapes of Switzerland. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_title: CH-001 | Swiss Highlights Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 06 Nights / 07 Days Switzerland package (CH-001 / TRG-SWI-HIG-2026): Zurich • Lucerne • Mt. Titlis • Interlaken • Swiss Alps • Scenic Rail Journeys.

days.title: ARRIVAL IN ZURICH
days.description: Arrive in Zurich. Private transfer to your handpicked premium hotel. Evening at leisure to enjoy the city’s sophisticated charm.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: TRANSFER TO LUCERNE
days.description: Scenic transfer to Lucerne. Visit the iconic Chapel Bridge and take a peaceful lake cruise, a classic Swiss experience.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: MT. TITLIS ADVENTURE
days.description: Ascend to Mt. Titlis by cable car. Enjoy snow activities at the summit, creating unforgettable memories for your family.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: TRANSFER TO INTERLAKEN
days.description: Transfer to Interlaken, the adventure heart of Switzerland. Check into your luxury alpine retreat.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: JUNGFRAUJOCH EXCURSION
days.description: A spectacular journey to Jungfraujoch—the Top of Europe. Experience breathtaking panoramic views and high-altitude excitement.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: ALPINE LEISURE & EXPLORATION
days.description: A day of leisure or gentle exploration in the scenic surroundings, perfect for family bonding in the Swiss Alps.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your premium Swiss highlights expedition.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

inclusions.text: 06 Nights in handpicked premium hotels across Zurich • Lucerne • Mt. Titlis • Interlaken • Swiss Alps • Scenic Rail Journeys
Private executive chauffeur-driven luxury ground transfers throughout
Mt. Titlis cable car ascent with summit snow activities
Lucerne lake cruise and Chapel Bridge sightseeing
International airfare and Switzerland entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
